name: Sejuani

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Fury of the North
passive.description_source: Innate - Icebreaker: Enemies  stunned by  Sejuani are also marked Frozen at the same time. Her next  basic attack or  ability against a Frozen target will consume the mark to deal bonus magic damage based on their maximum health.

effects.description: Innate - Icebreaker: Enemies stunned by Sejuani are marked Frozen for the disable's duration. Sejuani's next basic attack or ability against a Frozen enemy will consume the mark to deal bonus magic damage equal to 10% of their maximum health, capped at 250 against epic monsters.

Innate - Frost Armor: Sejuani gains Frost Armor, which lingers for 3 seconds after taking damage from enemy champions, turrets, or large monsters. She restores it after 12 : 5.29 (based on level) seconds without taking damage from them.
Frost Armor: Sejuani gains slow immunity, cripple immunity, 10 (+ 75% bonus armor) bonus armor, and 10 (+ 75% bonus magic resistance) bonus magic resistance.

passive.description: Innate - Icebreaker: Enemies stunned by Sejuani are marked Frozen for the disable's duration. Sejuani's next basic attack or ability against a Frozen enemy will consume the mark to deal bonus magic damage equal to 10% of their maximum health, capped at 250 against epic monsters.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Gaining Frost Armor does not remove any pre-existing slows or cripples.

basic_ability_1.name: Arctic Assault
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Sejuani  dashes to the target location, dealing magic damage and briefly  knocking up enemies she passes through. She will stop upon hitting an enemy  champion.

effects.context_notes: Active: Bristle dashes to the target location until he collides with an enemy champion, dealing magic damage to enemies he passes through and knocking them up for 0.

effects.description: Arctic Assault can be cast during her other abilities without cancelling them and vice versa.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Bristle dashes to the target location until he collides with an enemy champion, dealing magic damage to enemies he passes through and knocking them up for 0.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Champions will slightly be knocked back, while minions and monsters will instead be slightly pulled for a fixed distance.

basic_ability_2.name: Winter's Wrath
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Sejuani swings her flail in a cone in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit,  knocking back  minions and  monsters.

effects.context_notes: After the cast time, Sejuani lashes out with her flail in a line in the same direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 75% for 0.
After the cast time, Sejuani lashes out with her flail in a line in the same direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 75% for 0.

effects.description: Sejuani can move during Winter's Wrath's cast time.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: After 0.25 seconds into the cast time, Sejuani swings her flail in a cone in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit and knocks back minions and monsters hit, though not through terrain.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shields will block only a single instance of damage - either the swing or the lash.

basic_ability_3.name: Permafrost
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive:  Winter's Wrath and both  Sejuani's and nearby allied  melee champions'  basic attacks  on-hit apply  stacks of Frost against  champions, medium / large  monsters and large  minions, which lasts a few seconds and stacks up to a cap. Sejuani can cast Permafrost against an enemy with max stacks.

effects.description: Passive - Frostbrand: Winter's Wrath and both Sejuani's and nearby allied melee champions' basic attacks on-hit apply stacks of Frost to enemy champions, medium or large monsters, and large minions for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 4 times, though not applying if the target is Frozen. Enemies hit by Permafrost or Glacial Prison's bola have all of their Frost stacks consumed. Enemy champions cannot be affected by Frost for 8 seconds after having it consumed. Sejuani can cast Permafrost against an enemy with 4 stacks.

effects.context_notes: Active: Sejuani hurls a trap at the visible enemy with 4 stacks of Frost closest to the cursor, which deals magic damage, displaces slightly, and stuns them for 1 second.

effects.description: Permafrost resets Sejuani's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive - Frostbrand: Winter's Wrath and both Sejuani's and nearby allied melee champions' basic attacks on-hit apply stacks of Frost to enemy champions, medium or large monsters, and large minions for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 4 times, though not applying if the target is Frozen. Enemies hit by Permafrost or Glacial Prison's bola have all of their Frost stacks consumed. Enemy champions cannot be affected by Frost for 8 seconds after having it consumed. Sejuani can cast Permafrost against an enemy with 4 stacks.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Permafrost's targeting prioritizes champions within 50 units of the cursor's selection, then non-champions within 50 units of the cursor's selection, then champions within 350 units of the cursor's selection, then the closest unit to the cursor within 2500 units (the last case strictly applies if there is no target being selected).

ultimate.name: Glacial Prison
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Sejuani throws an ice bola in the target direction that stops upon hitting an enemy champion, dealing magic damage and briefly  stunning them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Sejuani throws an ice bola in the target direction that stops upon hitting an enemy champion, dealing magic damage and stunning them for 1 second.
If the bola travels at least 425 units, it becomes empowered to detonate upon reaching maximum range or hitting an enemy champion, dealing increased magic damage and stunning for 1.

effects.description: After 2 seconds, the storm shatters to deal the increased magic damage to enemies within and slow them by 80% for 1 second, as well as revealing them and granting sight of the area for 0.5 seconds.
The enemy hit by the bola is not affected by the storm's effects.

ultimate.description: Active: Sejuani throws an ice bola in the target direction that stops upon hitting an enemy champion, dealing magic damage and stunning them for 1 second.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Applies spell damage to the primary target and area damage to secondary targets in the ice storm.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
